title: Adversarial Defense via Learning to Generate Diverse Attacks
abstract: The paper proposes using a recursive and stochastic generator that produces strong and diverse adversarial perturbations that comprehensively reveal the vulnerability of the target classifier, improving robustness against various attack types on MNIST and CIFAR-10.
citation_identity: Cite for: adversarial defense, diverse adversarial attack generation, robust training, defenses that use learned attack generators

topic_cluster.name: Generative Modeling, Robustness, and Vision-Language Adaptation
